userProfile.title: UserProfile
userProfile.description: User specific progress, saved vocabulary, and streak data.

userId.description: The Firebase Auth UID of this user.

bookmarkedWordIds.description: List of saved vocabulary word IDs.

bookmarkedQuestionIds.description: List of saved practice question IDs.

answeredQuestions.description: Map of question IDs to their selected answer ('Vero' or 'Falso').

chaptersProgress.description: Map of chapter IDs to completion progress percentage.

isPremium.description: Indicates whether the user has purchased the full course.

paymentReceiptName.description: Name of the uploaded bank transfer receipt document.

paymentReceiptDate.description: Timestamp indicating when the receipt was uploaded.

paymentReceiptBase64.description: Base64 encoded compression representation of the receipt.

chapter.title: Chapter
chapter.description: Educational content divided into sub-lessons, vocabulary, and questions.

description.description: Brief description of the content covered in the chapter.

lessons.description: List of lessons inside the chapter.

questions.description: List of quiz questions inside the chapter.

vocabulary.title: VocabularyWord
vocabulary.description: Bilingual driving-related vocabulary word flashcard entry.

/users/{userId}.description: Collection storing personalized study progress for each registered user.

/chapters/{chapterId}.description: Educational chapters cache synced to db.

/vocabulary/{wordId}.description: Bilingual vocabularies cache synced to db.
